name: Principality of Shelk
summary: Elves remain primary, with Half-Elves, Humans, Gnomes, and Firbolgs retained as the best-supported extension of Shelk’s urban, artistic, and nature-linked identity.
magic_policy: Fashion enchantment and glyph anxiety exist under broader Principalities law.

bounded_population_signals: field-level support classification preserved in demography layer
